title: Device Forensics: Cisco IOS XE — Live CLI (CVE-2023-20198)
description: IOSXE-EDGE-01 may have been hit by the WebUI auth-bypass (CVE-2023-20198) + Lua-implant chain. Connect, run real IOS XE commands, confirm or rule out.

hints.text: `connect iosxe-edge-01`. `enable` password is `n0c-l3v3l-15`. Start with `show users` to spot the live session, then `show running-config | include privilege 15`.
`show webui-log` is the synthetic surface for the WebUI access log — the `%25` URL-double-encoding tells you exactly which paths bypassed auth.
`show platform software process list` reveals processes; one isn't part of a stock IOS XE image.
